# Documentation for `scw feedback`

Send feedback to the Scaleway CLI Team!

- [Send a bug-report](#send-a-bug-report)
- [Send a feature request](#send-a-feature-request)

## Send a bug-report
Send a bug-report to the Scaleway CLI team on the GitHub repository.

**Usage:**

```shell
scw feedback bug
```

**Examples:**


Send a bug report

```shell
scw feedback bug
```


## Send a feature request
Send a feature request to the Scaleway CLI team.

**Usage:**

```shell
scw feedback feature
```

**Examples:**


Send a feedback

```shell
scw feedback feature
```
